examples: Sandman's experimentation has made him something of a cult figure on the local music scene.
Some contain live experimentation, but not always.
While centralization ensures that all students are equipped with roughly the same resources and perform at roughly the same level, it also discourages experimentation.
Thriving ecosystems require promiscuous behavior, where people are open to experimentation, risk-taking, and sharing ideas.
Experimentation in a small number of stores is common practice in retail before nationwide roll-outs.
